abstract: GramIO — type-safe TypeScript Telegram Bot API framework for Node.js, Bun, Deno. Use proactively for ANY Telegram-bot task: commands, callbacks, inline queries, reactions, reply/inline keyboards, message formatting with entities, file uploads, multi-step scenes/wizards/FSM, sessions, plugins, webhook vs long-polling, Telegram Stars, Mini Apps, Docker, migrations. Activate on sight of `gramio`/`@gramio/*` packages, `new Bot()`, `bot.command`, `bot.callbackQuery`, or mention of Telegram bots.
